about:
Help, Info & Additional Resources
---
Read the change log, roadmap, and license
cb_focus_box_mode:
Focus box mode
---
Determines how the next box
coordinate is calculated
cb_similarity: RGB similarity of the painting to the source image ($sim_scope)
channel_update_status:
Switch message log channels on or off
to only see the messages you want
clear_focus_boxes: Clears focus box divisions from the focus area
delete_active_bounds:
Wipes all brush strokes from
the active sampling bounds:
be that the focus box, focus area,
or the entire canvas
dialog_cannot_validate_scale_factor_with: Cannot validate scale factor without a validated source image
dialog_contains_invalid_character: Contains one or more invalid characters
dialog_must_be_gr_eq_1: Must be greater than or equal to 1
edit_project_settings:
Edit project settings including name and save folder
---
"Save project as..." without the save operation
export:
Exports the painting as a PNG image to the project's save folder.
The number of completed strokes is appended to the file name.
fb_free:
No automatic movement between intervals;
only manual movement with the arrow keys
fb_prioritize_worst:
Focus box similarities in the focus area
are sorted from least to most similar.
A random index is assigned that is weighted
to favour the least similar focus boxes.
fb_random: Assigns a random focus box after every interval
fb_worst:
Assigns the focus box with the lowest
similarity evaluation after every interval
focus_box_as_focus_area:
The focus area will be propagated to
the bounds of the current focus box
new_project: Create a new $program_name project from a source image
program_settings:
Program config settings like
language and visual theming
reset_focus_area:
The bounds of the focus area will be
set to the bounds of the entire canvas
save: Writes the project to a ZIP file in its save folder
save_as:
Edit project settings including name and
save folder, then saves the project
tick_mode_attempted:
Both completed strokes and rejected stroke
attempts count towards interval progress
tick_mode_completed: Only completed strokes count towards interval progress
toggle_tick_mode:
Determines whether only completed strokes or all
stroke attempts count towards interval progress
(currently measuring $accepted_or_attempted)
tool_draw_focus_area:
Use the mouse to draw a rectangle
to define the bounds within which
brush strokes will be attempted
tool_focus_box_select:
Hover over the focus area and click to
select the focus box at the mouse position
tool_hand: Click and drag to reposition the canvas
tool_move_focus_area:
Click and drag on the focus area
or the nodes around its border to
move or resize the focus area
tool_zoom:
Left-click and right-click on the canvas
to zoom in and out, respectively
